location_precision.why: Every one of the six findings cites a precise file:line such as "src/sync.py:14" and "src/report.py:11".

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is described in isolation with no explanation of how separate defects combine into a compound failure mode (e.g., the swallowed exception at line 39 is never linked to persisting bad state from another defect).

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. "floor-divides the page count, so the final partial page is never fetched" and mutable default "seen=[]" "is shared across all calls...so any user id synced once is skipped."
